{{ $ctx := . }} {{/* Home icon */}}
  1. 🏠
    2. {{/* Build directory crumbs from the file path without requiring _index.md */}} {{ $rel := "" }} {{ if .File }} {{ $rel = .File.Path }} {{ end }} {{ if ne $rel "" }} {{ $dir := path.Dir $rel }} {{ $segments := cond (ne $dir ".") (split $dir "/") (slice) }} {{ $acc := "" }} {{ range $i, $seg := $segments }} {{ $acc = printf "%s%s/" $acc $seg }} {{ $accTrim := strings.TrimSuffix "/" $acc }} {{ $section := $ctx.Site.GetPage "section" $accTrim }} {{ if $section }}
  2. {{ replace $seg `-` ` ` | title }}
    3. {{ else }}
  3. {{ replace $seg `-` ` ` | title }}
    4. {{ end }} {{ end }} {{ end }} {{/* Current page (skip on home to avoid duplicate label) */}} {{ if not .IsHome }}
  4. {{ .LinkTitle }}
    5. {{ end }}
